<!-- docs/README — index of Kitsune's documentation set. -->
<!-- Groups every doc and component README by role with a one-line purpose; flags the generated files. -->

# Kitsune docs index

A map of the `docs/` tree (and the per-component READMEs), grouped by role. New here? Start with
[`architecture.md`](architecture.md). For "what does Kitsune detect / evade today," jump to the
generated catalogs. Rule counts and the `ruleset_version` are **not** repeated in prose anywhere —
they live in [`detection-catalog.md`](detection-catalog.md) (generated from
[`contracts/rules/registry.yaml`](../contracts/rules/registry.yaml), whose head carries the current
`ruleset_version`).

> **Generated docs** are marked _(generated by `task docs` — do not hand-edit)_. They are rebuilt from
> the registry, the fleet, and the scored `corpus/sessions/` runs; edits to them are overwritten.

## Entry / design

| Doc | Purpose |
|---|---|
| [`architecture.md`](architecture.md) | The whole system end to end: edge → detector → coherence engine → scoreboard, and the three collectors. Read this first. |
| [`arena.md`](arena.md) | The public challenge-gate arena (PoW / CAPTCHA / slider / rotate / emoji & doodle image-select / checkbox / managed / PACT): the gate catalog, difficulty levels (a cost dial), image-source licences, and the per-gate evasion status — the live demo that a solved challenge ≠ a human. |
| [`adr/`](adr/) | MADR architecture decision records — the load-bearing calls ([README](adr/README.md)): session-correlation pipeline, polyglot-with-contracts, rules-as-data, tiered coverage, per-connection QUIC attribution (ADR-0005). |

## Calibration & grounding

| Doc | Purpose |
|---|---|
| [`calibration.md`](calibration.md) | Measuring the false-positive rate against real browsers (browserforge + second sources); the precision gate behind every convicting rule. |
| [`grounding.md`](grounding.md) | The standing constraint: no convicting rule ships without a faithful red-team positive **and** a zero-FP sweep. |
| [`mobile-biomech-grounding.md`](mobile-biomech-grounding.md) | Touch-biomechanics grounding on BrainRun (CC0, 161k swipes) + Aalto keystroke data behind the mobile behavioral floors (G10, bh.touch_uniform_velocity, bh.mobile_keystroke_interval_floor). |
| [`behavioral-data.md`](behavioral-data.md) | Curating biomechanics datasets for the weakest layer — the corpora and second sources (SapiMouse, BrainRun, Aalto) that ground behavioral rules. |
| [`prevalence-model.md`](prevalence-model.md) | Scoring improbable-but-coherent fingerprints — the joint-rarity model beyond hard contradiction rules. |

## Landscape / competitive

| Doc | Purpose |
|---|---|
| [`landscape.md`](landscape.md) | Kitsune vs. the bot-detection field — where the commercial/OSS detectors sit and where the incoherence thesis is differentiated. |
| [`detection-landscape.md`](detection-landscape.md) | Kitsune vs. the live-detection field specifically — feature-by-feature against shipping detectors. |
| [`catalog.md`](catalog.md) | Curated catalog of relevant external projects, libraries, and test sites referenced across the lab. |

## Frontiers / roadmaps

| Doc | Purpose |
|---|---|
| [`research-radar.md`](research-radar.md) | The detection⇄evasion loop's intake queue: external papers/tools mapped to a Kitsune seam, tagged groundable-in-sandbox vs external-data-bound. |
| [`red-team-roadmap.md`](red-team-roadmap.md) | The evader fleet's arms-race backlog — the red-team work queue (allow-list only). |
| [`adversary-emulation-roadmap.md`](adversary-emulation-roadmap.md) | Roadmap for emulating real adversary tradecraft against the detector. |
| [`findings.md`](findings.md) | Empirical results from running the fleet against the detector — the arms-race ladder, what each anti-detect tool leaks, and the durable signals. |

## Ops / deploy

| Doc | Purpose |
|---|---|
| [`deploy.md`](deploy.md) | Hosting the full stack with a real network edge. |
| [`ip-reputation-data.md`](ip-reputation-data.md) | The producer for the reputation layer (datacenter ASN / proxy / VPN / Tor exit); pairs with the keyless DB-IP Lite geo path (`dbip-city-lite.mmdb` / `dbip-asn-lite.mmdb`, refreshed by the geo-refresh companion). |

## Coordination

| Doc | Purpose |
|---|---|
| [`coordination-proxy.md`](coordination-proxy.md) | Fleet-level coordination verdicts — the two fleet shapes a spoofing fleet cannot both avoid; includes the scenario battery (precision/recall) and a worked snapshot. |

## Generated reference _(do not hand-edit)_

| Doc | Purpose |
|---|---|
| [`detection-catalog.md`](detection-catalog.md) | Complete auto-generated registry of every detection rule + the curated gap/frontier log. _(generated by `task docs` — do not hand-edit)_ |
| [`evasion-catalog.md`](evasion-catalog.md) | Complete auto-generated registry of the evader fleet and every exercised technique + leverage/frontier analysis. _(generated by `task docs` — do not hand-edit)_ |
| [`matrix.md`](matrix.md) | The rules × evaders detection matrix — per-evader verdict, score, and convicting tells. _(generated by `task docs` — do not hand-edit)_ |
| [`scoreboard.md`](scoreboard.md) | Per-layer scoreboard for the committed captures. _(generated by `task docs` — do not hand-edit)_ |

## History (delivered — kept for rationale, not current)

| Doc | Purpose |
|---|---|
| [`history/hosted-demo-plan.md`](history/hosted-demo-plan.md) | Delivered plan for running the full ruleset live against a real visitor; the live runbook is now [`deploy.md`](deploy.md). |
| [`history/landing-redesign.md`](history/landing-redesign.md) | Delivered landing-page redesign (all phases shipped); current UX lives in the served pages. |

## Component READMEs

| README | Purpose |
|---|---|
| [`../README.md`](../README.md) | Repo front page — the project pitch and the generated stat/red-team blocks. |
| [`../contracts/README.md`](../contracts/README.md) | The JSON Schema wire contracts + coherence-rule registry — the only coupling between components. |
| [`../detector/README.md`](../detector/README.md) | Session correlation, coherence engine, scoring, store, `/ingest`. |
| [`../edge/README.md`](../edge/README.md) | Raw ClientHello → JA3/JA4, HTTP/2 + QUIC/HTTP-3 + TCP/IP fingerprints, session minting, signal forwarding. |
| [`../harness/README.md`](../harness/README.md) | Scenario runner + reproducible scoreboard; the ethics allow-list. |
| [`../collector/README.md`](../collector/README.md) | In-browser signal collection — the focused production page script + the full self-test livepage. |
| [`../evaders/README.md`](../evaders/README.md) | The red-team ladder of real anti-detect tools/browsers (allow-list only). |
